languages.text: {n}Ювенна грациозно опускается на колени, стараясь не совершать лишних движений. Ее голос возвышается до звенящего крика.{/n} "Все, что я делаю — ради династии фон Валанциус!"
{n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ювенна грациозно опускается на колени, стараясь не совершать лишних движений. Ее голос возвышается до звенящего крика.{/n} "Все, что я делаю — ради династии фон Валанциус!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

languages.text: {n}Juvenna cae de rodillas con elegancia, evitando realizar movimientos innecesarios. Su voz se convierte en un grito ensordecedor:{/n} «¡Todo lo que hago es por el bien de la dinastía von Valancius!».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna cae de rodillas con elegancia, evitando realizar movimientos innecesarios. Su voz se convierte en un grito ensordecedor:{/n} «¡Todo lo que hago es por el bien de la dinastía von Valancius!».

languages.text: {n}尤文娜优雅地跪下，小心翼翼地不做出任何多余的动作。她的声音骤然拔高，几乎变成一声尖锐的宣告：{/n}“我所做的一切，都是为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜优雅地跪下，小心翼翼地不做出任何多余的动作。她的声音骤然拔高，几乎变成一声尖锐的宣告：{/n}“我所做的一切，都是为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna s'agenouille avec grâce, évitant soigneusement tout geste inutile, après quoi sa voix s'élève dans un cri retentissant :{/n} « Je ne fais que servir les intérêts de la dynastie von Valancius ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna s'agenouille avec grâce, évitant soigneusement tout geste inutile, après quoi sa voix s'élève dans un cri retentissant :{/n} « Je ne fais que servir les intérêts de la dynastie von Valancius ! »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna, gereksiz hareketler yapmamaya özen göstererek zarif bir şekilde dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor. Sesi çınlayan bir çığlığa dönüyor.{/n} "Yaptığım her şey, von Valancius hanedanlığının iyiliği içindi!"
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna, gereksiz hareketler yapmamaya özen göstererek zarif bir şekilde dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor. Sesi çınlayan bir çığlığa dönüyor.{/n} "Yaptığım her şey, von Valancius hanedanlığının iyiliği içindi!"

languages.text: {n}Juvenna sinkt anmutig auf ihre Knie, ohne sich unnötig zu bewegen. Ihre Stimme schwillt zu einem durchdringenden Schrei an:{/n} "Alles, was ich tue, dient dem Wohl der Dynastie derer von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna sinkt anmutig auf ihre Knie, ohne sich unnötig zu bewegen. Ihre Stimme schwillt zu einem durchdringenden Schrei an:{/n} "Alles, was ich tue, dient dem Wohl der Dynastie derer von Valancius!"

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは無駄な動きをせず、膝を曲げて優雅に倒れる。彼女の声は響き渡る叫びに変わる。{/n}「私がする全てはフォン・ヴァランシウス家のために！」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna falls gracefully to her knees, careful not to make any unnecessary movements. Her voice rises to a ringing cry:{/n} "Everything I do is for the sake of the von Valancius dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: {n}ジュベナは無駄な動きをせず、膝を曲げて優雅に倒れる。彼女の声は響き渡る叫びに変わる。{/n}「私がする全てはフォン・ヴァランシウス家のために！」
